H1300.strongs_def: lightning; by analogy, a gleam; concretely, a flashing sword

H1304.derivation: or בָּרְקַתxlit bârᵉkath corrected to bârᵉqath; from H1300 (בָּרָק);
H1304.strongs_def: a gem (as flashing), perhaps the emerald

H1305.kjv_def: make bright, choice, chosen, cleanse (be clean), clearly, polished, (shew self) pure(-ify), purge (out).
H1305.usage: pure(5x), choice(2x), chosen(2x), clean(2x), clearly(1x), manifest(1x), bright(1x), polished(1x), purge(1x), purified(1x)

H1306.derivation: probably from H7562 (רֶשַׁע) with a prepositional prefix; with wickedness;

H1307.strongs_def: a Berothite, or inhabitant of Berothai

H1309.strongs_def: glad tidings; by implication, reward forgood news

H1310.strongs_def: properly, to boil up; hence, to be done in cooking; figuratively to ripen
H1310.kjv_def: bake, boil, bring forth, roast, seethe, sod (be sodden).
H1310.usage: seethe(10x), boil(6x), sod(6x), bake(2x), ripe(2x), roast(2x)

H1313.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be fragrant; (compare H5561 (סַם))

H1314.derivation: or בֹּשֶׂם; from the same as H1313 (בָּשָׂם);
H1314.strongs_def: fragrance; by implication, spicery; also the balsam plant

H1315.derivation: feminine of H1314 (בֶּשֶׂם) (the second form); fragrance;
H1315.strongs_def: Bosmath, the name of a wife of Esau, and of a daughter of Solomon

H1316.strongs_def: Bashan (often with the article), a region East of the Jordan

H1319.strongs_def: properly, to be fresh, i.e. full (rosy, (figuratively) cheerful); to announce (glad news)
H1319.kjv_def: messenger, preach, publish, shew forth, (bear, bring, carry, preach, good, tell good) tidings.

H1320.strongs_def: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
H1320.kjv_def: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.
H1320.usage: flesh(256x), body(2x), kin(2x), myself(1x), nakedness(1x), skin(1x)

H1321.strongs_def: {flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman}

H1322.strongs_def: shame (the feeling and the condition, as well as its cause); by implication (specifically) an idol
H1322.kjv_def: ashamed, confusion, [phrase] greatly, (put to) shame(-ful thing).

H1323.strongs_def: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
H1323.kjv_def: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.
H1323.usage: daughter(526x), town(32x), village(12x), first(3x), apple(1x), branches(1x), children(1x), company(1x), eye(1x), old(1x)

H1324.derivation: probably from the same as H1327 (בַּתָּה);
H1324.strongs_def: a bath or Hebrew measure (as a means of division) of liquids

H1325.strongs_def: {a bath or Hebrew measure (as a means of division) of liquids}

H1326.derivation: probably an orthographical variation for H1327 (בַּתָּה);

H1327.derivation: feminine from an unused root (meaning to break in pieces);

H1328.derivation: apparently from the same as H1326 (בָּתָה) and H410 (אֵל); destroyed of God;
H1328.strongs_def: Bethuel, the name of a nephew of Abraham, and of a place in Palestine
H1328.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H1329.strongs_def: Bethul (i.e. Bethuel), a place in Palestine

H1330.derivation: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to separate;
H1330.strongs_def: a virgin (from her privacy); sometimes (by continuation) a bride; also (figuratively) a city or state

H1331.derivation: masculine plural of the same as H1330 (בְּתוּלָה);
H1331.strongs_def: (collectively and abstractly) virginity; by implication and concretely, the tokens of it

H1332.derivation: from H1323 (בַּת) and H3050 (יָהּ); daughter (i.e. worshipper) of Jah;

H1337.derivation: from H1323 (בַּת) and a masculine plural from H7227 (רַב);

H1338.derivation: from H1334 (בָּתַר); (with the article) the craggy spot;
H1338.strongs_def: Bithron, a place East of the Jordan

H1339.derivation: from H1323 (בַּת) and H7651 (שֶׁבַע) (in the sense of H7650 (שָׁבַע)); daughter of an oath;

H1340.derivation: from H1323 (בַּת) and H7771 (שׁוֹעַ); daughter of wealth;  the same as H1339 (בַּת־שֶׁבַע)

H1342.strongs_def: to mount up; hence, in general, to rise, (figuratively) be majestic
H1342.kjv_def: gloriously, grow up, increase, be risen, triumph.

H1345.derivation: from H1342 (גָּאָה) and H410 (אֵל); majesty of God;

H1346.strongs_def: arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament
H1346.kjv_def: excellency, haughtiness, highness, pride, proudly, swelling.
H1346.usage: pride(9x), excellency(3x), haughtiness(2x), arrogancy(1x), highness(1x), proud(1x), proudly(1x), swelling(1x)

H1347.derivation: from H1342 (גָּאָה); the same as H1346 (גַּאֲוָה)xlit gaʻăvâh corrected to gaʼăvâh
H1347.kjv_def: arrogancy, excellency(-lent), majesty, pomp, pride, proud, swelling.
H1347.usage: pride(20x), excellency(10x), majesty(7x), pomp(5x), swelling(3x), arrogancy(2x), excellent(1x), proud(1x)

H1348.derivation: from H1342 (גָּאָה); the same as H1346 (גַּאֲוָה)xlit gaʻăvâh corrected to gaʼăvâh
H1348.kjv_def: excellent things, lifting up, majesty, pride, proudly, raging.

H1350.derivation: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.
H1350.strongs_def: to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.)
H1350.kjv_def: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.
H1350.usage: redeem(50x), redeemer(18x), kinsman(13x), revenger(7x), avenger(6x), ransom(2x), deliver(1x), kinsfolks(1x), purchase(1x), stain(1x), wise(1x)

H1351.derivation: a primitive root, (rather identified with H1350 (גָּאַל), through the idea of freeing, i.e. repudiating);

H1353.strongs_def: redemption (including the right and the object); by implication, relationship

H1354.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hollow or curve; (compare H1460 (גֵּו) and H1479 (גּוּף))
H1354.strongs_def: the back (as rounded); by analogy, the top or rim, a boss, a vault, arch of eye, bulwarks, etc.
H1354.kjv_def: back, body, boss, eminent (higher) place, (eye) brows, nave, ring.
H1354.usage: rings(2x), bodies(2x), back(1x), backs(1x), bosses(1x), eyebrows(1x), naves(1x)

H1355.strongs_def: {the back (as rounded); by analogy, the top or rim, a boss, a vault, arch of eye, bulwarks, etc.}

H1356.strongs_def: a log (as cut out); also well or cistern (as dug)

H1358.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H1461 (גּוּב);
H1358.strongs_def: a pit (for wild animals) (as cut out)

H1360.derivation: from an unused root meaning probably to collect;
H1360.strongs_def: a reservoir; by analogy, a marsh

H1361.strongs_def: to soar, i.e. be lofty; figuratively, to be haughty
H1361.kjv_def: exalt, be haughty, be (make) high(-er), lift up, mount up, be proud, raise up great height, upward.

H1364.usage: high(24x), higher(5x), lofty(2x), exceeding(1x), haughty(1x), height(1x), highest(1x), proud(1x), proudly(1x)

H1366.strongs_def: properly, a cord (as twisted), i.e. (by implication) a boundary; by extension the territory inclosed
H1366.kjv_def: border, bound, coast, [idiom] great, landmark, limit, quarter, space.
H1366.usage: border(158x), coast(69x), bound(5x), landmark(4x), space(2x), limit(1x), quarters(1x)

H1368.derivation: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);
H1368.kjv_def: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.

H1369.derivation: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);
H1369.strongs_def: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
H1369.kjv_def: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
H1369.usage: might(27x), strength(17x), power(9x), mighty(2x), force(1x), mastery(1x)

H1371.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be high (in the forehead);

H1372.strongs_def: baldness in the forehead; by analogy, a bare spot on the right side of cloth

H1373.derivation: from the same as H1354 (גַב); collective

H1375.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to be convex);
H1375.strongs_def: a goblet; by analogy, the calyx of aflower

H1378.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to freeze);

H1379.derivation: a primitive root; also as a denominative from H1366 (גְּבוּל)
H1379.strongs_def: properly, to twist as arope;  to bound (as by a line)

H1380.derivation: from H1379 (גָּבַל) (in the sense of a chain of hills); a mountain;

H1382.strongs_def: a Gebalite, or inhabitant of Gebal

H1384.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be arched or contracted;

H1385.derivation: feminine from the same as H1384 (גִּבֵּן);

H1386.strongs_def: a hump or peak of hills

H1387.derivation: from the same as H1375 (גְּבִיעַ), a hillock;

H1388.derivation: by permutation for H1389 (גִּבְעָה); a hill;

H1389.derivation: feminine from the same as H1387 (גֶּבַע);

H1390.strongs_def: Gibah; the name of three places in Palestine

H1391.derivation: from the same as H1387 (גֶּבַע); hilly;

H1396.strongs_def: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently

H1397.strongs_def: properly, a valiant man or warrior; generally, a person simply

H1398.strongs_def: Geber, the name of two Israelites
